claim_text: NVIDIA says Spectrum-X Ethernet Photonics is in production and uses co-packaged optics for million-GPU AI factories.
notes: Roadmap anchor for treating CPO as more than social-media narrative.

claim_text: NVIDIA describes CPO ecosystem needs across photonics ICs, electronic ICs, fiber, packaging, connectors and lasers.
notes: Supports chain map and recursive search nodes.

claim_text: NVIDIA says Quantum-X Photonics and Spectrum-X Photonics bring CPO into networking and cites better power efficiency as the reason for AI factory scaling.
notes: Used for roadmap and first-principles mechanism.

claim_text: TSMC says COUPE integrates EIC, PIC and light sources into a substrate/package-level optical engine and is scheduled for production in 2026.
notes: Supports package integration bottleneck and production timing.

claim_text: NVIDIA and Coherent announced a strategic partnership including a $2 billion investment commitment to accelerate advanced optical networking and capacity expansion.
notes: Strongest source for COHR handoff, but company-level economics still need diligence.

claim_text: NVIDIA and Lumentum announced collaboration on optics technology for AI networking including CPO-related components and laser-source work.
notes: Used for LITE handoff; revenue materiality still unproven.

claim_text: Veeco reported more than $250 million in orders from leaders serving AI and CPO markets to equip high-volume InP laser manufacturing, with deliveries starting in 2026 and accelerating in 2027.
notes: Key source for identifying InP laser manufacturing equipment as a next-layer bottleneck.

claim_text: AXT says InP substrates are used in fiber optic lasers and detectors, data-center connectivity, AI, silicon photonics and photonic integrated circuits, and discusses development of 6-inch InP substrates.
notes: Supports AXTI as upstream candidate; export/geography and financial quality need separate diligence.

claim_text: NVIDIA and Corning announced a long-term partnership to increase optical connectivity manufacturing capacity for NVIDIA AI infrastructure, including more fiber and new plants.
notes: Supports optical connectivity scale-out as a real but less pure bottleneck.

claim_text: Ayar Labs and Sivers describe DFB laser arrays and SuperNova external light source work for high-bandwidth optical I/O.
notes: Private/public ecosystem signal, not enough for a liquid US stock handoff by itself.
